results.title: India at CWG 2026: Know Your Athlete - Minakshi Harichandra Jadhav (Wheelchair Basketball, 3x3)
results.description: Minakshi Jadhav will captain India's women's 3x3 wheelchair basketball team at Glasgow 2026, marking the country's first Commonwealth Games appearance in the event. After a spinal cord injury in 2012, she rose through the sport to lead India to historic qualification at the 2025 IWBF Asia-Oceania Championships. Glasgow will be her Commonwealth Games debut.

results.title: Alvarez and Paredes hit back-to-back homers in Astros' 5-2 win over Marlins
results.description: Yordan Alvarez and Isaac Paredes hit back-to-back home runs in the eighth inning to lift the Houston Astros to a 5-2 win over the Miami Marlins, completing a three-game series sweep.
